title: oxyacantha × kyrtostyla
intro: Oxyacantha × kyrtostyla, also known as the Haskap berry or Blue Honeysuckle, is a hybrid deciduous shrub native to East Asia, resulting from the cross between Lonicera tatarica and Lonicera caerulea. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to support cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Oxyacantha × kyrtostyla include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cognitive function, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and jams, which can be consumed fresh or dried to reap its medicinal and nutritional benefits.
